channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-711] lfsck : @@@@@@ FAIL: removing objects failed
item.description:
v2_1_0_0_RC2 testing

Report: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/18d6652a-e58c-11e0-9909-52540025f9af

08:23:11:----============= acceptance-small: lfsck ============---- Thu Sep 22 08:23:10 PDT 2011
08:23:12:Running: bash /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/lfsck.sh
08:23:12:which: no lfsck in (/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/mpi/gcc/openmpi/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/sbin:/root/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/X11R6/bin:/usr/games:/usr/lib/mit/bin:/usr/lib/mit/sbin

08:23:12:client-22vm2: Checking config lustre mounted on /mnt/lustre

08:23:15:enable quota as required

08:24:20:removing objects from /dev/mapper/lvm-P0 on : 42 43
08:24:21:client-22vm4: debugfs 1.41.90.wc4 (01-Sep-2011)
08:24:21:client-22vm4: /tmp/debugfs.YC6um7v6FJ: No such file or directory
08:24:21: lfsck : @@@@@@ FAIL: removing objects failed
08:24:21:Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2011-09-22/lustre-master-el6-x86_64-sles11-x86_64_283_-7f86ff513a78/lfsck..*.1316705060.log
08:24:25:lfsck returned 0
08:24:25:running: liblustre
08:24:26:run_suite liblustre /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/liblustre.sh
item.environment:
Lustre Clients:
Tag: v2_1_0_0_RC2
Distro/Arch: Sles11/x86_64 (kernel version: 2.6.32.43-0.4-default)
Build: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/arch=x86_64,build_type=client,distro=sles11,ib_stack=inkernel/
Network: TCP
ENABLE_QUOTA=yes

Lustre Servers:
Tag: v2_1_0_0_RC2
Distro/Arch: RHEL6/x86_64 (kernel version: 2.6.32-131.6.1.el6)
Build: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/283/arch=x86_64,build_type=cserver,distro=el6,ib_stack=inkernel/
Network: TCP

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
hm, so why is this problem reported here? TT-177 is quite different for this bug. Please advise.

The original issue was hit in autotest run. In order to reproduce the issue, I manually ran the test but hit TT-177. So, I think it's better to describe this in this ticket to make a comparison between the results of autotest and manual runs.

hm, so why is this problem reported here? TT-177 is quite different for this bug.
Please advise.

Yujian, am i missing something?

Yes, "Manually running lfsck test failed with TT-177".

From this last report, it seems that lfsck was not installed on the node, no?

-----============= acceptance-small: lfsck ============----- Fri Sep 23 05:04:33 PDT 2011
Running: bash /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/lfsck.sh
which: no lfsck in (/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/mpi/gcc/openmpi/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/sbin:/root/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/X11R6/bin:/usr/games:/usr/lib/mit/bin:/usr/lib/mit/sbin:)
client-1: Checking config lustre mounted on /mnt/lustre
client-2: Checking config lustre mounted on /mnt/lustre
[...]

lfsck -c -l --mdsdb /home/yujian/test_logs/mdsdb --ostdb /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-0 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-1 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-2 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-3 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-4 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-5 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-6 /mnt/lustre
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 2564: lfsck: command not found
 lfsck : @@@@@@ FAIL: lfsck -c -l --mdsdb /home/yujian/test_logs/mdsdb --ostdb  /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-0 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-1 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-2 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-3 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-4 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-5 /home/yujian/test_logs/ostdb-6 /mnt/lustre returned 127, should be <= 1 
Dumping lctl log to /home/yujian/test_logs/2011-09-23/050355/lfsck..*.1316779576.log

Yujian, am i missing something?

Lustre Tag: v2_1_0_0_RC2
Lustre Build: http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/283/
Distro/Arch: RHEL6/x86_64(server, 2.6.32-131.6.1.el6_lustre), SLES11/x86_64(client, 2.6.32.36-0.5-default)
Network: TCP (1GigE)
ENABLE_QUOTA=yes

Manually running lfsck test failed with TT-177:
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/26d65256-e5dd-11e0-9909-52540025f9af
